mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clothes (cloth_name, image, type_id, style, price, operator_id) VALUES (#{clothName}, #{image}, #{typeId}, #{style}, #{price}, #{operatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_clothes SET cloth_name = #{clothName}, image = #{image}, type_id = #{typeId}, style = #{style}, price = #{price} WHERE id = #{id}
